description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Create MacOS Build & Installer that runs on pushes to macos-actiontest, master, and release branches. Use a macos-10.15 job to check out the code, set up CMake, get the OpenKJ version, and configure the build environment. Install Qt, GStreamer, and other dependencies, then build and sign the OpenKJ app bundle. Create an installer package, and upload it to Google Cloud Storage.
